ops.title: Release v0.24.0: whole-codebase DRY-up (kind registry, fold engine, splice codec, CLI/fusefs descriptor collapse)

ops.text: old-vs-new binary E2E diff on a v0.23.0-created fixture repo is byte-identical for list/show/history/compact/viz state, and scripted --help diff across the command tree is empty
golden vocabulary, DTO-shape, model wire-bytes, and mount goldens are byte-unchanged across the whole v0.24.0 range
gh release view v0.24.0 shows all binaries + SHA256SUMS and brew tap carries 0.24.0 (after v0.24.0-rc prerelease exercised smoke-macos)
